allow: Bash(python -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p = sync_playwright\(\).start\(\); b = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\); b.close\(\); p.stop\(\); print\(''Playwright OK''\)")

Bash(python -c "from config import COMFYUI_ENABLED, COMFYUI_HOST, COMFYUI_PORT, GENERATED_BACKGROUNDS_DIR; print\(f''COMFYUI_ENABLED={COMFYUI_ENABLED}''\); print\(f''HOST={COMFYUI_HOST}:{COMFYUI_PORT}''\); print\(f''BG_DIR={GENERATED_BACKGROUNDS_DIR}''\)")
